# Daily Report — 2026-05-17

## Task Completed
Added `list_change_tasks` and `create_change_task` tools to `change_tools.py`.

- `list_change_tasks`: queries `change_task` table filtered by `change_request` sys_id; accepts
  change request number (e.g. CHG0001234) or sys_id; optional `state` filter; full
  `limit`/`offset` pagination; returns `has_more` flag.
- `create_change_task`: POSTs to `change_task` table linked to a change request; supports
  `description`, `assigned_to`, `assignment_group`, `state`, `planned_start_date`,
  `planned_end_date`, `work_notes`; date fields validated via existing
  `validate_servicenow_datetime`.
- `_resolve_change_request_sys_id` helper: passthrough for 32-char hex sys_ids, otherwise
  performs a lookup by number.
- Both tools registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and added to `change_coordinator`
  and `full` packages in `tool_packages.yaml`.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1099
- Coverage: 91%
- All passing: yes
- New tests: 20 (tests/test_change_task_tools.py)

## Security
System-level vulnerabilities in pyjwt, setuptools, urllib3, wheel — unrelated to project code.
Project dependencies are clean.
